title: When the Cat Comes
writer: Jirí Brdecka, Vojtech Jasný, Jan Werich
actors: Jan Werich, Emília Vásáryová, Vlastimil Brodský
plot: People arrive in a small village with a strange cat wearing glasses. When someone takes them off, he can color people, according to their nature and mood. Adults consider him dangerous; children love him.
